title: Persistent Volumes
text:
Each PV contains a spec and status, which is the specification and status of the volume.
The name of a PersistentVolume object must be a valid
DNS subdomain name
.
apiVersion
:
v1
kind
:
PersistentVolume
metadata
:
name
:
pv0003
spec
:
capacity
:
storage
:
5Gi
volumeMode
:
Filesystem
accessModes
:
-
ReadWriteOnce
persistentVolumeReclaimPolicy
:
Recycle
storageClassName
:
slow
mountOptions
:
-
hard
-
nfsvers=4.1
nfs
:
path
:
/tmp
server
:
172.17.0.2
